candidates.row_label: Amortisation and depreciation of intangible and tangible fixed assets
candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A line above EBIT, but it appears as a separate overhead line within operating expenses rather than a sub-line of the selected COGS bucket 'Direct costs'. Therefore it should not be added to COGS.
Looks like a component detail under the broader operating D&A line, not a separate COGS-specific D&A row.
Looks like a component detail under the broader operating D&A line, not a separate COGS-specific D&A row.
Looks like a component/detail line within operating D&A, not specifically tied to the selected COGS bucket.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is only 'Direct costs'. The visible D&A rows are presented separately among operating expense lines after gross profit, not as part of or alongside the chosen COGS row. Conservatively avoid adding any D&A to COGS to prevent double counting.

candidates.row_label: Amortisation and depreciation of intangible and tangible fixed assets
candidates.why: This is an explicit operating D&A line shown separately at the same level as other operating expense buckets ('Other external expenses', 'Staff costs') and contributes to 'Total costs'. It appears outside the already selected XSGA_COMPONENTS rows, so it should be added separately later. Prefer this summary row over component D&A rows.
Appears to be a component detail beneath the broader D&A summary row. Do not select separately if the summary row is used.
Appears to be a component detail beneath the broader D&A summary row. Do not select separately if the summary row is used.
Likely part of the broader D&A disclosure area; to avoid double counting, prefer the summary D&A row instead of this component/detail line.

final_choice.row_label: Amortisation and depreciation of intangible and tangible fixed assets

variables.notes: The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS rows are 'Selling, General & Admin', 'Other external expenses', 'Staff costs', and 'Research Costs'. The explicit D&A line is shown separately within the operating section and appears outside those selected rows. Use only the summary D&A row, not its component lines, to avoid double counting.
